projects.title: Sum and Average of Array Elements
projects.description: Read N integers into an array and compute their sum and average.

projects.title: Find Maximum and Minimum in Array
projects.description: Find the largest and smallest element in an array.

projects.title: Reverse an Array (using temporary array)
projects.description: Reverse the elements of an array using a second array.

projects.title: Reverse an Array (in-place)
projects.description: Reverse an array without using another array (two-pointer swap).

projects.title: Count Even and Odd Elements
projects.description: Count the number of even and odd elements in an array.

projects.title: Search an Element (Linear Search)
projects.description: Find the index of a given element using linear search. Return -1 if not found.
projects.exampleText:
Enter size: 5
Enter elements: 10 23 45 67 89
Enter element to search: 45

projects.title: Second Largest Element in Array
projects.description: Find the second largest element in an array without sorting.

projects.title: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
projects.description: Given a sorted array, remove duplicates in-place and return new length.
projects.exampleOutput:
Array after removing duplicates: 1 2 3 4
New length = 4

projects.title: Insert Element at Specific Position
projects.description: Insert an element at a given position in an array (shift right).
projects.exampleText:
Enter size: 5
Enter elements: 10 20 30 40 50
Enter position (0-5) and value: 2 25

projects.title: Delete Element at Specific Position
projects.description: Delete an element at a given position in an array (shift left).
projects.exampleText:
Enter size: 6
Enter elements: 10 20 30 40 50 60
Enter position to delete (0-5): 2

projects.title: Rotate Array Left by One
projects.description: Rotate the array left by one position (first element moves to end).

projects.title: Rotate Array Right by One
projects.description: Rotate the array right by one position (last element moves to front).

projects.title: Rotate Array Left by K Positions
projects.description: Rotate array left by K positions (efficient method).
projects.exampleText:
Enter size: 7
Enter elements: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7
Enter K: 3

projects.title: Rotate Array Right by K Positions
projects.description: Rotate array right by K positions using reversal.
projects.exampleText:
Enter size: 7
Enter elements: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7
Enter K: 3

projects.title: Find Missing Number in Consecutive Array
projects.description: Given an array of size n-1 containing numbers from 1 to n with one missing, find the missing number.

projects.title: Find Pair with Given Sum (Two Sum)
projects.description: Find if there exists a pair of elements in the array that sum to a given target.
projects.exampleText:
Enter size: 6
Enter elements: 8 7 2 5 3 1
Enter target sum: 10

projects.title: Find Majority Element (Moore's Voting Algorithm)
projects.description: Find the element that appears more than n/2 times (if exists).

projects.title: Move All Zeros to End
projects.description: Given an array, move all zeros to the end while maintaining order of non-zero elements.

projects.title: Merge Two Sorted Arrays
projects.description: Merge two sorted arrays into a third sorted array.
projects.exampleText:
Enter size of first array: 4
Enter sorted elements: 1 3 5 7
Enter size of second array: 3
Enter sorted elements: 2 4 6

projects.title: Union and Intersection of Two Sorted Arrays
projects.description: Find union and intersection of two sorted arrays.

projects.title: Bubble Sort
projects.description: Sort an array using bubble sort.

projects.title: Selection Sort
projects.description: Sort an array using selection sort.

projects.title: Insertion Sort
projects.description: Sort an array using insertion sort.

projects.title: Binary Search on Sorted Array
projects.description: Implement binary search to find an element in a sorted array.
projects.exampleText:
Enter size: 7
Enter sorted elements: 2 5 8 12 16 23 38
Enter element to search: 16

projects.title: Check if Array is Sorted
projects.description: Determine if an array is sorted in non-decreasing order.

projects.title: Leaders in an Array
projects.description: Print all leaders (elements greater than all elements to their right).

projects.title: Maximum Subarray Sum (Kadane's Algorithm)
projects.description: Find the maximum sum of a contiguous subarray (Kadane's algorithm).

projects.title: Find Equilibrium Index
projects.description: Find an index where sum of left elements equals sum of right elements.

projects.title: Wave Array (Sort in Wave Form)
projects.description: Arrange array elements in wave form: arr[0] >= arr[1] <= arr[2] >= arr[3] <= ...

projects.title: Rearrange Positive and Negative Numbers
projects.description: Rearrange array so that positive and negative numbers alternate, preserving order if possible.

projects.title: Matrix Addition
projects.description: Add two matrices of same dimensions.
projects.exampleText:
Enter rows and cols: 2 2
Matrix A: 1 2 3 4
Matrix B: 5 6 7 8

projects.title: Matrix Multiplication
projects.description: Multiply two matrices (if compatible).
projects.exampleText:
Enter rows/cols of A: 2 3
A: 1 2 3 4 5 6
Enter rows/cols of B: 3 2
B: 7 8 9 10 11 12

projects.title: Transpose of a Matrix
projects.description: Find transpose of a matrix.

projects.title: Check if Matrix is Symmetric
projects.description: Check if a square matrix is symmetric (equal to its transpose).
projects.exampleText:
Enter order of matrix: 3
Enter matrix: 1 2 3 2 4 5 3 5 6

projects.title: Row-Wise Sum of Matrix
projects.description: Compute sum of each row of a matrix.

projects.title: Column-Wise Sum of Matrix
projects.description: Compute sum of each column of a matrix.

projects.title: Matrix Diagonal Sum (Primary)
projects.description: Find sum of primary diagonal of a square matrix.

projects.title: Matrix Secondary Diagonal Sum
projects.description: Find sum of secondary diagonal of a square matrix.

projects.title: Check Sparse Matrix
projects.description: Determine if matrix is sparse (more zeros than non-zero).

projects.title: Upper Triangular Matrix
projects.description: Check if a matrix is upper triangular (all below main diagonal zero).

projects.title: Lower Triangular Matrix
projects.description: Check if a matrix is lower triangular (all above main diagonal zero).

projects.title: Matrix Rotation 90 Degrees Clockwise
projects.description: Rotate a square matrix 90 degrees clockwise in-place.

projects.title: Matrix Rotation 90 Degrees Anticlockwise
projects.description: Rotate a square matrix 90 degrees anticlockwise in-place.

projects.title: Find Determinant of 2x2 Matrix
projects.description: Compute determinant of a 2x2 matrix.

projects.title: Find Determinant of 3x3 Matrix
projects.description: Compute determinant of a 3x3 matrix.

projects.title: Magic Square Check
projects.description: Check if a given square matrix is a magic square (all rows, columns, diagonals sum to same number).

projects.title: Spiral Traversal of Matrix
projects.description: Print matrix elements in spiral order.

projects.title: Find Row with Maximum 1's in Binary Matrix
projects.description: Given a binary matrix sorted row-wise, find row with maximum number of 1's.

projects.title: Boundary Elements of Matrix
projects.description: Print boundary elements of a matrix.

projects.title: Find Peak Element (2D Matrix)
projects.description: Find a peak element in a 2D matrix (greater than or equal to its neighbors).
